description: Capy is an AI software engineering platform that runs coding tasks in isolated cloud VMs, plans work with a Captain agent, and creates diffs and pull requests against connected repositories. It integrates with tools such as GitHub, Slack, Linear, and Vercel to route work and surface results in a team's existing workflow.
summary: capy.ai exposes a documented REST API at https://capy.ai/api/v1 authenticated by Capy API tokens, plus per-automation incoming webhook endpoints at https://capy.ai/api/webhooks/automations/trigger/{token} with optional HMAC signatures; no GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
